name: 30 Second Golf Lessons
about: 30 Second Golf Lessons is a golf training facility offering both in-person instruction and indoor simulator rentals. Located in Dyer, IN, with outdoor sessions at Scherwood Golf, the venue provides personalized coaching packages, video swing analysis, and on-course lessons. Their simulator rental at Good Ball is priced at $30 per hour and caters to golfers looking to practice or play in an immersive environment. The facility emphasizes rapid skill improvement through structured lessons and provides a range of packages for different skill levels and age groups, including junior programs and women-specific beginner clinics.
why_golfers_like_it: Personalized video swing analysis with audio notes for at-home review
Flexible lesson packages with indoor and outdoor options
Junior-focused coaching programs certified by First Tee
Affordable simulator rentals at $30 per hour

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, students are required to bring their own clubs for lessons and simulator rentals.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: No information is provided on food or drink services, but BYOB is not mentioned.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: No specific information is provided on simulator course times.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the facility offers junior lessons for ages 6-12, summer golf camps, and a certified First Tee Junior Golf Instructor.
